title: Custom eggless birthday cakes for Marsden Park, Schofields, Box Hill
summary:
Finding a fully custom eggless cake near Marsden Park is harder than it should be.

Riverstone Shopping Centre now has one. We bake 100% eggless — not some cakes, every cake. Six sizes from 6-inch to 16-inch. 15 flavours including Rasmalai and Mango. Any design — bring a photo reference and we'll recreate it.

48 hours minimum notice. That's what fresh baking actually takes. Pickup from Shop 8, Riverstone Shopping Centre. Free parking. Open from 6am weekdays.

Order via WhatsApp: +61 425 697 725. Starts at $39.99 for a 6-inch.
